query:
-- Link Tim Chan's calls (Aircall user ID 1940186, DB handler ID 90001)
UPDATE call_history 
SET handlerId = 90001, agentName = 'Tim Chan'
WHERE agentId = 1940186 OR agentName = 'Tim Chan';

-- Link Geovanni Cabrera's calls (Aircall user ID 1947062, DB handler ID 90002)
UPDATE call_history 
SET handlerId = 90002, agentName = 'Geovanni Cabrera'
WHERE agentId = 1947062 OR agentName = 'Geovanni Cabrera';

-- Verify
SELECT agentName, handlerId, COUNT(*) as calls, 
       SUM(direction='inbound') as inbound, 
       SUM(direction='outbound') as outbound,
       SUM(status='answered') as answered,
       SUM(status='missed') as missed
FROM call_history 
WHERE agentName IN ('Tim Chan', 'Geovanni Cabrera')
GROUP BY agentName, handlerId;
